nodes.body: Closing: layout regression fixture corpus infrastructure is shipped. 30 fixture cases (120 files) live under tests/fixtures/layout_regression/. The corpus structure, per-case files, and regeneration scripts (ocr_fixtures.py, regenerate_layouts.py, dump_reorganize_output.py) are all implemented per docs/specs/04-layout-regression-fixtures.md. Parent spec issue #28 is already closed. Adding more fixtures is ongoing maintenance, not a new deliverable.

issue.body:
Filed from the pd-book-tools deep code/security review.

Report: `docs/research/2026-05-22-deep-code-security-review.md`
Finding: #32

Moved from mistakenly filed meta issue: ConcaveTrillion/ocr-container-meta#325

Evidence:

- `pyproject.toml:2`
- `pyproject.toml:18`
- `.github/workflows/ci.yml:23`
- `.github/workflows/ci.yml:25`

Build requirements and many runtime dependencies use broad lower bounds, and CI uses mutable action/tool references such as `astral-sh/setup-uv@v4` with `version: latest`.

Impact:

- Builds can change without reviewed repository diffs.

Remediation:

- Pin GitHub Actions to commit SHAs for release-critical workflows.
- Pin `uv` versions.
- Use lockfile/hash-enforced installs for releases.

---
This issue was filed from a read-only review. Confirm behavior with a focused failing test before implementation where practical.
issue.title: pd-book-tools: general supply-chain pins are incomplete
